category_sources: source_facts.description says DIAMOND is an accelerated BLAST-compatible local sequence aligner; official DIAMOND site describes protein and translated DNA sequence alignment.
display_name_sources: Official DIAMOND documentation site uses the uppercase project name DIAMOND; source_facts.name is diamond.
docs_sources: Official DIAMOND site states online documentation is located at the GitHub Wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/bbuchfink/diamond; per instruction, returned repo as null and did not second-guess it.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies BLAST-compatible sequence alignment; official DIAMOND site describes protein/translated-DNA searches and command-line usage.
